name: First date - Lyra
description:
You knew Lyra in your freshman year of high school. You spoke a few times, but she was too shy and quiet to talk much then. But now, shes at a new school, she’s popular, has a ton of friends, and is stunning. And, lucky you, she has a huge crush on you :3

I’m trying to cut down on tokens (so jllm users don’t have to suffer) so the physical descriptions of characters are going to be less thorough, and I adopted a new template that may or may not work better (this is my first not trying it) so let me know what you all think. Also, public descriptions now yayyyyy

Discord server
creator: Fried toothpaste
